features: 48H PROTECTION: This gentle anti-perspirant deodorant offers up to 48 hours of protection against odours and sweat, keeping underarms fresher for longer
KIND TO SKIN: The anti-perspirant for men uses a gentle alcohol-free formula with chamomile and avocado oil extracts. It is gentle on sensitive skin while providing reliable protection
ELIMINATE ODOUR: The men's deodorant offers full protection from unpleasant underarm odour, preventing it from developing throughout activities and keeping you smelling fresh
HOW TO USE: Shake the men's deodorant spray well before use. Hold the can 15 cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before dressing
DERMATOLOGICALLY APPROVED: The men's aerosol spray is dermatologically proven to be kind to sensitive skin. It contains no ethyl alcohol and is gentle on delicate underarm skin
description: Product Description NIVEA Men Sensitive Protect Spray (150ml) — For up to 48 hours of freshness This gentle anti-perspirant offers reliable protection while caring for sensitive skin. The men's aerosol spray has been specially formulated using chamomile extract and avocado oil to soothe the skin, refreshing and protecting the underarms. The spray provides up to 48 hours of freshness, battling against odours and visible sweat patches to keep you feeling fresh. Present in over 160 countries, NIVEA is one of the world's largest and most trusted skincare brands with more than 140 years of experience. As a market leader in the global skincare industry, our researchers work extensively to provide high-quality, dermatologically approved products to suit various skin types and needs.​ How to use: Shake the men's deodorant spray well before use. Hold the can 15 cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before dressing Product Benefits: 72H protection from sweat and odour Kind to skin Chamomile and avocado oil to soothe Dermatologically tested Free from ethyl alcohol 150ml Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isopropyl Palmitate, Parfum, Chamomilla Recutita Flower Extract, Bisabolol, Persea Gratissima Oil, Octyldodecanol, Glycine Soja Oil, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Dimethicone, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, BHT, Linalool, Geraniol, Citronellol Directions Directions: Shake well before use. Hold can 15 cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before getting dressed. Safety Warning Danger: Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurised container: May burst if heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Empty can before recycling. Use exclusively for the intended purpose. Do not spray into eyes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Keep out of reach of children. Solvent Abuse Can Kill Instantly Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd., Birmingham, B37 7YS. See more
